name: Turn Manager handles uncertainty without consuming reprompt budget
description: When the user says they don't know the answer to a pending question, the system sends a soft probe once without counting it as a failed reprompt. If the user repeats the uncertainty, the system records an uncertain observation and moves on.

expectations.description: System sends a soft uncertainty probe after first 'I don't know'
After repeated uncertainty, system moves to the next question
Session completes and confirms Brief is ready
